task_completion.description: Navigate to the Projects workspace in Nuxeo Web UI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Web UI is open in a browser and the current location or breadcrumb shows the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Confidential HR Documents' folder with the correct description
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder titled 'Confidential HR Documents' is visible in the Projects workspace, and its description is set to 'Restricted folder for HR department confidential documents'.

task_completion.description: Block permission inheritance for the folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The permissions or access rights screen for the 'Confidential HR Documents' folder shows that permission inheritance from parent folders is blocked or disabled.
The permissions screen for the folder lists the user 'jsmith' with 'Read & Write' (or equivalent 'Write'/'Edit') access.
The permissions screen for the folder lists the group 'members' with 'Read' access.

task_completion.description: Create a Note document titled 'Employee Policy Update' containing remote work policy text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Confidential HR Documents' folder, there is a Note document titled 'Employee Policy Update'. The content of the note is visible and contains text regarding an updated remote work policy.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo Web UI in a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nuxeo web interface in a browser window, rather than terminal commands, API calls, or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Nuxeo Platform
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the Nuxeo Platform Web UI, not a mock-up, text editor, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Results are genuinely created, not faked via browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, breadcrumbs, and URLs appear consistent with actual navigation and creation, without signs of DOM manipulation just to fake the text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target workspace path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects. Expected folder title: 'Confidential HR Documents'. Expected note title: 'Employee Policy Update'. Target user for permissions: 'jsmith'. Target group for permissions: 'members'. Note: The agent may have proactively overridden the folder's URL path to 'Confidential-HR' to satisfy programmatic verifiers, but as long as the display title is 'Confidential HR Documents', it is correct.
